paper_title: Genotype and Whole-Genome Sequencing Data Processing

methods.description: This method describes the collection of genotype data from various populations and the merging of this data with existing datasets to create a comprehensive SNP dataset for analysis.

steps.description: Samples were collected from Chad, Lebanon, Greece, and Yemen.
steps.searchable_summary: collect genotype samples from specified countries

steps.description: All samples (except for those from Greece) were genotyped with the Illumina HumanOmni2.5-8 BeadChip.
steps.searchable_summary: genotype samples using Illumina HumanOmni2.5-8 BeadChip

steps.description: Greek genotype information for the 2.5 million sites was extracted from sequence data and merged with array data from other populations.
steps.searchable_summary: extract and merge Greek genotype data with other populations

steps.description: The genotyping data were merged with data from the African Genome Variation Project, the 1000 Genomes Project, and Pagani et al.
steps.searchable_summary: merge genotyping data with existing genome projects

methods.description: This method outlines the sequencing of whole genomes and the processing of genotype data using various bioinformatics tools.

steps.description: 19 samples were whole-genome sequenced at >30x depth with Illumina HiSeq X Ten or HiSeq 2500 technology.
Genotype data were processed with PLINK: the SNP genotype success rate required was set to 99%, whereas SNPs with a minor allele frequency < 0.001 or Hardy-Weinberg p value < 0.000001 were removed.
steps.searchable_summary: process genotype data with PLINK, applying quality filters

steps.description: Genotypes from sequence data were called with SAMtools v.1.2 and BCFtools v.1.2 with the command 'samtools mpileup -q 20 -Q 20 -C 50 | bcftools call -c -V indels.'
steps.searchable_summary: call genotypes from sequence data using SAMtools and BCFtools

steps.description: Phasing was carried out with SHAPEIT with 1000 Genomes Project phase 3 haplotypes as a reference panel.
steps.searchable_summary: perform phasing using SHAPEIT with reference haplotypes
